resources.string: Allow access to monitor and block selected apps in real time.
Enable displaying a blocking screen when restricted apps are opened.
Grant permission to detect which apps are currently in use.
Allow the app to stay active and enforce blocking consistently.
Allow exact alarms to enforce app blocking at specific times without delay.
Enable \"Display pop-up windows while running in the background\" for Xiaomi devices to ensure blocking works correctly.
Some permissions are needed for the application to work properly. Please grant them below.
